# Techtiz

> AI-native engineering studio and U.S. SLED technical subcontractor for prime contractors.

Techtiz builds adaptive software systems for product teams and delivers back-office engineering as a named subcontractor to U.S. state, local, and education (SLED) prime contractors. Engagements are NDA-first and subcontract-only—we never face the agency directly.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://techtiz.co/): AI-native engineering studio overview
- [About](https://techtiz.co/about/): Mission, values, leadership team, and company history since 2020
- [Services](https://techtiz.co/services/): Custom software, AI, automation, and digital transformation
- [Industries](https://techtiz.co/industries/): Healthcare, e-commerce, logistics, education, and more
- [Case studies](https://techtiz.co/case-studies/): Commercial software delivery portfolio
- [Careers](https://techtiz.co/careers/): Software development and AI engineering roles
- [Contact](https://techtiz.co/contact/): Expert software development consultation

## U.S. SLED partnerships

- [U.S. SLED hub](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/): Prime contractor teaming and subcontract positioning
- [Capabilities](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/capabilities/): SLED technical backbone and compliance frameworks
- [How we engage](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/how-we-engage/): NDA-first teaming sequence
- [Operating model](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/operating-model/): Onshore-controlled, offshore-engineered delivery
- [Engagement examples](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/case-studies/): NDA-safe SLED past performance summaries
- [Procurement vehicles](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/procurement-vehicles/): Subcontract paths via prime vehicles
- [SLED contact / intake](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/contact/): Prime-focused subcontract inquiry
- [Capability statement](https://techtiz.co/us-sled/capability-statement/): Downloadable prime-facing statement

## Keywords

AI-native engineering, custom software development, AI automation, machine learning, low-code development, mobile app development, digital transformation, enterprise software, U.S. SLED subcontractor, state local education government IT, prime contractor teaming
